nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: AI as code generator or low-level implementer
nodes.grounding_span: use the AI assistant as a more high level research and problem dissection tool

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to prefer a collaborative approach personally

nodes.label: AI specificity and data preparation
nodes.grounding_span: being able to problem solve with a specificity that generally cannot be found by searching forums or documentation

nodes.label: AI as domain expert enabler for leading projects
nodes.grounding_span: us developers still need to have an understanding of the software we build

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle the actual coding myself

nodes.label: Efficiency in problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: narrowing the problem down to my specific use-case

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: got a solution in about 30 seconds, which was pretty satisfying

nodes.label: Contentment with current AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see it evolving too much from how I'm using it now

nodes.label: Back-and-forth iterative reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: work through the problem in more and more detail in a kind of back-and-forth manner

nodes.label: Informed and deliberate tool use with maintained expertise
nodes.grounding_span: AI assistants are tools that need to be used with an informed approach
